texto: What is so addictive about fiction is that it is the one reliable place in which we can apprehend and participate in - fully understand - the inward world of another person.
explicacao: Citação de Rick Gekoski sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “What is so addictive about fiction is that it is the one reliable place in which we can apprehend…” articula reflexao, books, fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e fiction.

texto: Reading exposes is to the experiences and minds of others, makes us challenge our own provinciality, deepens and widens who we are and what we can become.
explicacao: Citação de Rick Gekoski sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Reading exposes is to the experiences and minds of others, makes us challenge our own provinciali…” articula reflexao, reading, exposes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Reading exposes is to the experiences and minds of others, makes us challenge our own provinciality, deepens and widens who we are and what we can become.

texto: He won't remember any of this, he's too young and it's too painful. Children are wonderfully self-preserving. They filter memory, cleanse and sanitise it, unless it's too awful to renounce. And this isn't. Or is it? These gummy spots of time that inextricably adhere when so much more is erased, how do we account for their tenacity?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rick Gekoski que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “He won't remember any of this, he's too young and it's too painful. Children are wonderfully self…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, grief, loss, com foco em luto e loss.

frase_original: He won't remember any of this, he's too young and it's too painful. Children are wonderfully self-preserving. They filter memory, cleanse and sanitise it, unless it's too awful to renounce. And this isn't. Or is it? These gummy spots of time that inextricably adhere when so much more is erased, how do we account for their tenacity?

texto: If you will read and listen, you will admit a multiplicity of voices and points of view, consider them with some humility, allow them gracious entrance however strident or discordant some of them may sound, then you will grow and change, and each of these voices will become a constituent part of who you become, an atom of growing being. It is literature and only literature than can do this.
explicacao: Citação de Rick Gekoski sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “If you will read and listen, you will admit a multiplicity of voices and points of view, consider…” articula sucesso, empathy, literature em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e literature.

It is literature and only literature than can do this.
